name: future-plugins
description: Internal Claude Code plugins for the Future project — SDLC orchestration and future additions

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: SDLC lifecycle orchestration: ticket authoring (spec-to-backlog, triage-issue, create-ticket), start-work, and finish-work. Delegates to the atlassian and superpowers plugins when installed; falls back to markdown otherwise. Enforces the Agile standards in its bundled references/standards.md.
